description: In this talk Carson Gross will explore a little known philosophy of Nintendo's Gunpei Yokoi: Lateral Thinking with Weathered (or Withered, or Seasoned) Technology.  He will examine both django and htmx in terms of this philosophy and explore why these two technologies work together so well.
title: Keynote: Lateral Thinking with Weathered Technology: How The Nintendo Philosophy Applies to Modern Web Development
